title: Advanced Content Management System Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Content Management System Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><g transform='translate(50,50)'><rect x='0' y='0' rx='10' width='300' height='250' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='20' rx='10' width='260' height='200' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='10' y='40' rx='10' width='280' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='10' y='70' rx='10' width='280' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='20' y='80' font-size='16' fill='#fff'>Published Articles</text><text x='20' y='120' font-size='16' fill='#fff'>Article Views</text><text x='20' y='160' font-size='16' fill='#fff'>Search</text><rect x='20' y='140' rx='10' width='220' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><g transform='translate(250,120)'><circle r='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='0' y='0' font-size='14' fill='#666'>Category 1</text></g><rect x='20' y='200' rx='10' width='260' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='20' y='210' font-size='16' fill='#fff'>AI-Powered Suggestions</text><g transform='translate(20,230)'><circle r='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='0' y='0' font-size='14' fill='#666'>Article Title 1</text><text x='0' y='18' font-size='14' fill='#666'>Article Title 2</text></g></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must feature a chart with article views and dynamic data updates
Must include a search bar to filter articles by category or title

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Content Management System Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
